name: The Campus Booth
description:
There is a Photo Booth at your college that was made by Pop Palace with new features; will you give it a try?

The options are

Sex Doll: You get turned into a sex doll.

Nozzle Nipples: You get a nozzle on your nipples so you can change the size of your breasts.

Bodypart Balloons: Your whole body gets turned into an inflated balloon person.

Normal Balloons: Each of your body parts gets turned into normal balloons.

Water Balloon: You get turned into a balloon person, and then you fill with water.

Pool Toy: You transform into a pool toy.

Inner Tube: You transform into an inner tube.

Pinata: You transform into a pinata person.

[inflation, multiple, sex doll TF, popping, transformation, breast expansion]

This is based on the story by pop-palace called: The Campus Booth

Photo by D-91-H
creator: bobibone
